title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CAINBUÃGAN BARRIO SCHOOL, MUNICIPALITY OF CADIZ, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO LUIS CONSING MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3208 / 53 OG No. 15, 4775 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1644, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CAINBUÃGAN BARRIO SCHOOL, MUNICIPALITY OF CADIZ, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO LUIS CONSING MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Cainbuñgan Barrio School, Municipality of Cadiz, Province of Negros Occidental, is changed to Luis Consing Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
